feature_spec.definition: 度量管理层在问答环节中回答的即兴程度，即偏离准备稿的程度，预期即兴程度越高，市场反应越积极。

theory_basis.source: Unraveling Managerial Tangents in Firm Disclosure Conce (p.4)
theory_basis.excerpt: [16] show that a lack of spontaneity is negatively associated with the market reaction to the call, by using a measure of the adherence of transcripts to prepared scripts.
theory_basis.implication: 缺乏自发性（即严格遵循准备稿）与市场反应负相关，因此即兴程度高的问答环节传递更多增量信息，预期正向预测股价。

feature_spec.extraction_instruction: 分析管理层在问答环节中的回答文本，判断其即兴程度。即兴发言通常表现为：使用口语化表达（如'you know'、'well'、'actually'）、句子结构不完整或重复、自我纠正、使用填充词（如'uh'、'um'）、情绪波动明显。打分标准：+2分：大量即兴特征，语言明显不流畅或口语化；+1分：部分即兴特征，但整体仍较正式；-1分：语言高度正式、结构化，几乎没有即兴痕迹；-2分：语言完全照本宣科，几乎无自发表达。如果文本中完全没有上述特征，输出0分。
feature_spec.retrieval_query: spontaneous speech earnings call qa informal language unprepared

_theory_rag_refs.paper: Unraveling Managerial Tangents in Firm Disclosure Concealing Issues or Being Exposed
Same Company Same Signal The Role of Identity in Earnings Call Transcripts
An Exploratory Study of Stock Price Movements from Earnings Calls
Corporate Earnings Calls and Analyst Beliefs
Unraveling Managerial Tangents in Firm Disclosure Concealing Issues or Being Exposed

gov_result.feedback: 特征 'qa_spontaneity' 通过全部治理检查。IC=+0.1656, t=+4.983, zero_ratio=30.6%, direction_consistency=91%。
